name: Beijing Hezong Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Hezong Science & Technology Co., Ltd. provides power distribution solutions in China. The company offers gas insulated ring main units, MV/LV air insulated switchgears, prefabricated substations, pole-mounted switches, distribution automation terminals, transformers, cable branching switchgears, and cable junctions, as well as electrical accessories, such as fault passage indicators and premolded cable connectors. It also provides energy management system solutions and distribution network automation solutions, as well as mobile substations. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.
